summary: Frontend-only bug-fix validation completed on public URL. Most requested fixes pass (profile de-duplication, fixed sidebar on scroll, Reports/Settings anchor behavior, chart hover cleanup, team matrix readability, deal-size visibility, and no horizontal overflow). One major mobile text-fit regression was found.

ui_bugs.issue: At 390x844, header title/subtitle collapse to near-zero width and render vertically (one-character-per-line), breaking readability and alignment under aspect-ratio changes.

issues: Top-fold narrative text is visually broken and unusable due to layout compression
Text fitting/alignment requirement is not satisfied on narrow viewport

action_items: Fix mobile header layout conflict so title/subtitle keep usable width (390x844 repro).
Resolve CSS cascade conflict where dashboard-critical-fixes.css overrides responsive header grid behavior from dashboard-luxury-refinement.css.
Re-test text fitting/alignment across mobile aspect ratios after CSS adjustment.
critical_code_review_comments: CSS order/cascade regression: dashboard-critical-fixes.css redefines .dashboard-header-compact to a 2-column grid after luxury stylesheet media rules, causing copy column collapse on mobile.
Multiple large global style files with overlapping selectors increase regression risk; current bug is caused by conflicting duplicate selectors across style layers.

success_rate.frontend: 89% (8/9 requested bug-fix checks passed; mobile text-fit failed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified on https://maven-sales-hub.stage-preview.emergentagent.com via Playwright. Passing: profile de-duplication, sidebar fixed behavior, reports/settings anchors, hero/deals hover behavior, team matrix readability, pie side-panel updates, deal-size data visibility, and no horizontal overflow at 1920/768/390. Failing: mobile text-fit regression (390x844) with header copy rendered vertically. Screenshot captured: /app/test_reports/pytest/iteration4_mobile_textfit.jpeg.
rca of the issue: Repro: open app at 390x844. Observe header subtitle/title become 0-width-like columns and wrap one character per line. Root cause: CSS cascade conflict; dashboard-luxury-refinement.css sets responsive single-column header at <=1380px, but later-loaded dashboard-critical-fixes.css resets .dashboard-header-compact to two-column grid without equivalent mobile override, forcing copy column collapse when toolbar controls consume width. Mitigation: add/restore small-screen single-column override in final-loaded stylesheet or reduce selector overlap between style layers.
